title: Enchanting Black Ceramic Cauldron Cut Out Oil Burner - 10.5cm x 9cm (1 Pc.) - Luxurious Design, Premium Material, Aromatherapy Accessory - Ideal for Home & Office Decor
features: LUXURIOUS DESIGN: Add a touch of magic and sophistication to your home with our enchanting black ceramic cauldron cut out oil burner. The intricate cutout design and matte finish create an eye-catching statement piece for any room.

PREMIUM MATERIAL: Made from high-quality black ceramic, this oil burner offers durability and a sleek appearance that complements both traditional and modern décor styles. Experience the best in long-lasting home fragrance accessories.

AROMATHERAPY ACCESSORY: Unwind and create a relaxing ambiance in your living space with this versatile oil burner. Compatible with both fragrance oils and wax melts, this cauldron releases soothing scents for a calming and rejuvenating experience.

IDEAL FOR HOME & OFFICE DECOR: Elevate the look of your space with this stunning oil burner, perfect for setting a mysterious and enchanting atmosphere in your living room, bedroom, or office. Entertain guests and let this centerpiece spark conversations during Halloween celebrations or add a bewitching touch to your year-round decor.

GIFTABLE: Surprise your loved ones with this unique and creative aromatherapy accessory, making it an ideal gift for housewarming parties, birthdays, or just because. Add a mystical touch to your spooky decor, transforming your space into a captivating haven.
description: Product Description Our Black Cauldron Cat Cut Out Oil Burner reflects light beautifully and warms any space it's placed in. Directions To use this oil burner, ensure the tealight candle is placed securely in the base. Add your preferred fragrance oil or wax melt to the top dish. Light the candle and let the heat gently warm the oil or melt to release the scent. Always follow safety guidelines when using candles and hot surfaces. Safety Warning Never leave the diffuser on unattended. See more
